narrative: Hormuz crisis and central bank meetings dominate the weekend tape. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1726; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 159.33; BoJ meeting 28 Apr may see hawkish surprise, which would pressure USD/JPY from Friday's close. Crude bid likely to sustain AUD, CAD at the Tokyo open.
